creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Submitter replied in private mail:

Random User, 22.10.08, 08:40h CEST:

> Nope - current ports update for THE-3.2 and PDCURSES-3.3_1 with 
> Xaw3d-1.5E_2 still results in an unusable cursor, which also doesn't 
> appear in the non-X mode. Attached is a screenshot of the problem.No 
> cursor in the "command line" and something LIKE a cursor stuck up in the 
> top left corner. With PDCURSES-3.2, the cursor appears and behaves 
> normally, so for now I still say that THE should be restricted to 
> PDCURSES-3.2.
